text: Incorporate Aimparency GmbH/UG in Germany (grant prerequisite)
description:
**HUMAN ACTION REQUIRED**

Almost all German/EU grants (ZIM, IBB Pro FIT, KI4KMU, Digitalbonus) require a registered KMU before application.

**Quickstart:** meta/applications/incorporation-quickstart.md
**Input checklist:** meta/applications/HUMAN-INPUT-REQUIRED.md

**Recommended:** UG in Berlin, 50/50 Felix/Robin, ~€500-1500

**After incorporation provide:** HRB, address, email, phone, IBAN, Steuernummer, ELSTER status

status.comment: All German grant packages ready; submission blocked on UG/GmbH incorporation + founder contact details
